**Do not report vulnerabilities publicly via GitHub Issues.**
Please consult our [SECURITY.md](https://github.com/Loydie123/aegis-edr/blob/main/SECURITY.md) file for instructions on how to securely report vulnerabilities to our security team.

If you are requesting a security check configuration or logging improvement:
**Describe the security enhancement request**
A clear and concise description of the security feature or configuration you want implemented.

**Additional context**
Add any other context here.
